list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.description: Monitored SQL Server instance - one MSSQL datasource per instance. Type to search.

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH wait_data AS (
    SELECT
        ws.collection_time,
        ws.wait_time_ms_delta,
        interval_seconds = DATEDIFF(SECOND,
            LAG(ws.collection_time) OVER (ORDER BY ws.collection_time),
            ws.collection_time)
    FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
    WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND (${wait_type:sqlstring} = '*' OR ${wait_type:sqlstring} = '' OR ws.wait_type = N${wait_type:sqlstring})
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), collection_time),
    wait_ms_sec = CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(wait_time_ms_delta AS decimal(19,4)) / interval_seconds)
FROM wait_data
WHERE interval_seconds > 0
ORDER BY collection_time;

panels.title: Queries seen with ${wait_type} (grouped by query hash)

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH snap AS (
    SELECT
        plan_str         = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.query_plan),
        qs.database_name,
        cpu              = TRY_CAST(qs.cpu AS bigint),
        reads            = TRY_CAST(qs.reads AS bigint),
        writes           = TRY_CAST(qs.writes AS bigint),
        sql_text_preview = LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.sql_text), N'<?query --' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10), N''), CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + N'--?>', N''), 300)
    FROM report.query_snapshots AS qs
    WHERE qs.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND qs.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND (${wait_type:sqlstring} = '*' OR ${wait_type:sqlstring} = '' OR CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.wait_info) LIKE N'%)' + ${wait_type:sqlstring} + N'%')
        AND qs.query_plan IS NOT NULL
),
with_hash AS (
    SELECT
        query_hash = SUBSTRING(s.plan_str, CHARINDEX('QueryHash="', s.plan_str) + 11, 18),
        s.database_name,
        s.cpu,
        s.reads,
        s.writes,
        s.sql_text_preview
    FROM snap AS s
    WHERE s.plan_str LIKE '%QueryHash="%'
)
SELECT TOP (100)
    wh.query_hash,
    wh.database_name,
    appearances = COUNT(*),
    avg_cpu_ms  = AVG(wh.cpu),
    max_cpu_ms  = MAX(wh.cpu),
    avg_reads   = AVG(wh.reads),
    max_reads   = MAX(wh.reads),
    avg_writes  = AVG(wh.writes),
    sql_text    = MAX(wh.sql_text_preview)
FROM with_hash AS wh
GROUP BY wh.query_hash, wh.database_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

panels.description: Grouped by query hash extracted from the execution plan XML. Appearances = sp_WhoIsActive snapshots where the query was active with this wait type. Only covers snapshots where a plan was captured; plan-less rows are excluded.

panels.title: Sessions with ${wait_type} in wait_info (top 500)

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (500)
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), qs.collection_time),
    duration = qs.[dd hh:mm:ss.mss],
    qs.session_id,
    qs.status,
    qs.wait_info,
    qs.blocking_session_id,
    qs.blocked_session_count,
    qs.database_name,
    qs.login_name,
    qs.host_name,
    qs.program_name,
    sql_text = REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.sql_text), N'<?query --' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10), N''), CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + N'--?>', N''),
    sql_command = REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.sql_command), N'<?query --' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10), N''), CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + N'--?>', N''),
    cpu_ms = qs.CPU,
    qs.reads,
    qs.writes,
    qs.physical_reads,
    qs.context_switches,
    used_memory_mb = qs.used_memory,
    tempdb_current_mb = qs.tempdb_current,
    tempdb_allocations_mb = qs.tempdb_allocations,
    qs.tran_log_writes,
    qs.open_tran_count,
    qs.percent_complete,
    start_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), qs.start_time),
    tran_start_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), qs.tran_start_time),
    qs.request_id,
    additional_info = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.additional_info)
FROM report.query_snapshots AS qs
WHERE qs.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND qs.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
AND (${wait_type:sqlstring} = '*' OR ${wait_type:sqlstring} = '' OR CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qs.wait_info) LIKE N'%)' + ${wait_type:sqlstring} + N'%')
ORDER BY qs.collection_time DESC, qs.session_id;

panels.description: Rows where wait_info contains the selected wait type.
